Package edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.junit

Class Junit4TrialExecutorFactory

java.lang.Object

public final class Junit4TrialExecutorFactory extends Object implements TrialExecutorFactory
Builds Junit4TrialExecutors.

      public TrialExecutor create(Class<?> testClass, Method method)
      Description copied from interface: TrialExecutorFactory
      Creates an executor bound to the given test method.
      Specified by:
      create in interface TrialExecutorFactory
      Parameters:
      testClass - the class declaring the test method
      method - the test method to run on each trial
      Returns:
      an executor for the method
